Title: Tatakai no yukue!? Sai chôrô ni semaru Furîza no ma no te
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Ryô Horikawa
Plot: Goku charges to full power as Captain Ginyu watches. Bulma mourns the atrocities that Frieza has caused. Nail returns to Guru and Gohan and Krillin look for Bulma and her dragon radar. Guru unlocks Dende's hidden power and Frieza ...
